_meta.notes: Small hand-authored tree (not a live capture) used ONLY by the M3b career-detail golden dual-run (dual-run.test.tsx) and stream test (stream.test.tsx). career.status.tech.nodes (CareerViewProvider.BuildTechNodes) has no description/parts field at all — the real wire can never reproduce the rich per-node detail early-career-63-nodes.json exercises for the legacy-only tests (index.test.tsx), so a byte-identical dual-run needs a legacy fixture that already omits description/parts, matching what parseTechNodes produces for a new-wire (unlocked-boolean) entry. Includes a multi-parent node (stability) to exercise the same tech-tree edge shape the C# synthetic wire fixture covers.
